channel.title: Productive on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Productive on My Blog

item.title: habit-tracking
item.description:
Project for myself

I will build this project with python for writing code and gonna use postgres for storing my data. for right now this is just a general idea gonna make a clear structure tomorrow

  • Learn basics of python script.
  • Know how to connect both python and postgres.

general concept

item.title: Zettelkasten's method
item.description:
Intro

A Zettelkasten is a personal tool for thinking and writing. It has hypertextual features to make a web of thought possible. The difference to other systems is that you create a web of thoughts instead of notes of arbitrary size and form, and emphasize connection, not a collection.

links

[[Being Productive]]
